_comment: Coverage-gap wave 2. Each deck centers on assigned uncovered T3 cards (plus t2-air-defense). Supporting cards are realistic cheap openers / win-conditions from the catalog. Stages map to the loop-based enum: boss1=doom_knight L10, loop15, boss2=iron_golem L20, boss3=lizard_king L30.

decks.label: Warrior fire-bulwark (Forge Strike / Tombrage)
decks.notes: Centers t3-attack-defense-fire (Forge Strike: 12 dmg+8 armor+2 burn) and t3-counter-earth-earth (Tombrage: 12 armor + low-HP rage). t2-air-defense (Cyclone Ward) is the cheap armor/haste filler. Cheap physical openers front-loaded; burn is a side payoff via Kindle/Cinder Thrust. Warrior 50 stamina.

decks.label: Warrior burn-tempo + burn->armor convert
decks.notes: Centers t3-agility-agility-fire (Twinflame Flicker: cheap 1s 4-burn applier, INT scaling) feeding t3-air-defense-fire (Ember Aegis Gust: consume burn -> armor). Burn engine = Twinflame + Kindle + Cinder Thrust; converter banks it into armor. t2-air-defense rounds out armor. Stamina-leaning so warrior.

decks.label: Mage earth-fire armor/vengeance
decks.notes: Centers t3-earth-earth-fire (Magma Vow: 2m, 14 armor + Vengeance 14 Pierce) and t3-agility-earth-fire (Cinderquake: 1m, 10 dmg, armor>=10 rider). Magma Vein/Magma Vow build the armor that arms Cinderquake's pierce+burn rider; burn payoffs close. Mana-funded -> mage 60 mana.

decks.label: Reactive armor-control bulwark (both-resource)
decks.notes: Centers three 1s+1m 'both' armor/control T3s: t3-agility-counter-earth (Quickearth Rite, VIT scaling), t3-counter-defense-water (Crimson Regen Mantle, 20% DR + low-HP regen), t3-agility-defense-fire (Ember Vault, armor + Brace burn). Warrior funds the stamina half from the 50 pool; mana regen (+1/4.5s) covers the 1-mana halves spread across the fight. Cheap physical openers carry damage.

decks.label: Poison-rage bulwark (Bogwrath)
decks.notes: Centers t3-counter-earth-water (Bogwrath: 10 armor, Brace -> 4 poison + 3 rage) as a defensive poison seed, fed by a poison engine (Mire Bloom, Bog Catalyst doubler, Steaming Plague, Alchemic Drain). t3-agility-agility-fire (Twinflame) and t1-fire add a burn off-axis. Mana-funded poison core -> mage.
